from fastapi import FastAPI

app = FastAPI()


@app.get("/users/{user_id}")
async def get_user(user_id: int):
    user = await fetch_user(user_id)
    return {"id": user.id, "name": user.name, "email": user.email}


@app.get("/orders")
async def list_orders(status: str = "active"):
    orders = await fetch_orders(status)
    return [{"id": o.id, "total": o.total, "status": o.status} for o in orders]


@app.post("/payments")
async def create_payment(amount: int, currency: str):
    result = await process_payment(amount, currency)
    return {"id": result.id, "status": result.status, "amount": result.amount}
